text.title: Pain Point Research Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example of Pain Point Research producing a valid spec artefact, anonymised for portability.

step.name: trigger
step.text: Engagement onboarded; the Pain Point Research methodology was selected after Applies-If was satisfied (named owner Ruslan Faion, downstream consumer named in engagement charter, source-of-truth pinned in docs/).

step.name: apply-rules
step.text: Walked the rules from 01-core-rules.xml. Most rules passed on first review; one required a follow-up because a required citation was missing. Captured the gap, patched, re-ran.

step.name: produce
step.text: Filled templates/pain-point-research.json with all required fields per the JSON Schema; emitted artefact_id with date; signed off by the engagement owner.

step.name: validate
step.text: Ran scripts/validate-pain-point-research.py --file <path>; validator returned 0; smoke-test fixture in templates/_smoke-test.json also passed.

step.name: handover
step.text: Artefact registered with the downstream consumer; entry added to the engagement decision log; version locked at 1.1.0.

text.example: Applies-If held → inputs reachable → rules walked → artefact filled → validator returned 0 → owner signed off → downstream consumer registered.
